content.text: Top 10 Privileged Access Management (PAM) Solutions You Should Know
As digital transformation accelerates today, access control to data and systems has become a cornerstone of information security. According to a

, the global access control and authentication software market was valued at approximately $11.7 billion in 2022 and is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 8.8%, reaching $22.4 billion by 2030. This growth is driven by the widespread adoption of cloud-based access solutions, the integration of AI and IoT technologies, and the soaring demand for remote and mobile access. In particular, cloud-based access control systems are rapidly expanding due to their functionality and flexibility, establishing themselves as the optimal choice for centralized management and cost efficiency, especially in multi-site or SME environments.

QueryPie is a unified platform for enterprise data security and access control, enabling centralized management of permissions and audit trails across various IT assets such as databases, servers, Kubernetes, and SaaS applications. It enhances both security and operational efficiency through features like Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Just-In-Time access requests, and automated auditing and reporting—effectively preventing unauthorized access to sensitive data within the organization. QueryPie is gaining attention as a Privileged Access Management (PAM) solution that adapts flexibly to rapidly evolving cloud and AI environments. In particular, its AI Hub supports AI-powered anomaly detection and security automation, delivering more intelligent and dynamic access control.

CyberArk offers automated credential vaulting, session isolation, fine-grained access policies, and multi-environment support. With just-in-time elevation and robust audit capabilities, it aligns with Zero Trust principles and regulatory compliance demands.

StrongDM provides centralized privileged access across servers, databases, Kubernetes clusters, and more through a unified Zero‑Trust PAM engine. It supports RBAC/ABAC/PBAC policies, session recording, credential vaulting, and Just‑In‑Time provisioning to enforce Zero Standing Privilege across hybrid and cloud infrastructure—all while ensuring audit-ready logs and adaptive security posture.

Teleport unifies access control for SSH, Kubernetes, RDP, databases, and applications. It uses certificate-based authentication, SSO/MFA integration, and real-time audit logging—as a zero-trust gateway without VPN infrastructure.

Deal for remote-first environments, BeyondTrust combines credential vaults, remote session control, endpoint privilege limitation, and real-time threat analytics under a consistent privilege management framework.

Delinea’s Server PAM is an enterprise-grade Privileged Access Management (PAM) solution—available both on‑premise and in the cloud—designed to securely store, manage, and control privileged credentials through a centralized encrypted vault. It features automated password rotation, detailed auditing and reporting, role‑based access control, session monitoring, and support for multi-factor authentication.

One Identity offers a comprehensive PAM solution called Safeguard. It is designed to secure, monitor, and control privileged accounts. When integrated with Identity Manager, it enables full identity lifecycle governance, policy enforcement, and audit readiness across PAM operations.

ManageEngine PAM360 is an enterprise-level PAM solution designed to help IT teams manage and secure their privileged access operations. It supports automatic discovery of privileged accounts, encrypted credential vaults, Just‑In‑Time elevation, one-click session access, and AI-powered anomaly detection. It integrates with ITSM and SIEM platforms to streamline compliance and operations.

ARCON provides essential features and functionality needed to achieve a PAM maturity model called ARCON | PAM. Its comprehensive and scalable design delivers strong protection for privileged identities. ARCON | PAM supports the development of secure identity and access management systems and helps meet compliance requirements.

HashiCorp  Vault is a powerful secrets management and data protection tool designed to securely store, access, and tightly control secrets such as API keys, passwords, certificates, and encryption keys. It provides fine-grained access control through policies, dynamic secrets that expire after use, and robust audit logging for compliance.
